MCP (AI)

AI: the MCP server

@telekinesis/mcp lets an LLM author timesheets against your live frames, guarded by the JSON Schema so it can’t emit an unplayable sheet.

{ "mcpServers": { "telekinesis": { "command": "telekinesis-mcp" } } }

Tools

  • extract_ui_context({ url }) — list every registered <TelekineticFrame> on a running page (id, intent, viewport rect). Append ?demo to force demo mode.
  • generate_timesheet({ url | frames, goal }) — a schema-validated draft to refine.

Resources

  • telekinesis://schema/timesheet — the full JSON Schema (refs inlined).
  • telekinesis://effects — the action + sound catalog.

The model reasons over real frames; the schema is the guardrail. Refine the draft by hand or drop it into the Studio to tune it visually.

StudioCLI
